a.xlink:title: Entry point: run the distributed DMPlex geometry pipeline for all bodies.
Build a global table mapping each original vertex index to its owning MPI rank.
Build the DMPlexPatchExchange SF for cross-rank coordinate fetching.
Distribute the serial DMPlex and return per-rank original-index arrays.
Free all heap memory owned by a DMPlexPatchExchange and zero the struct.
Copy Loop subdivision patch stencil data from IBMNodes to a local layout.
Free all heap memory owned by a DMPlexPatchLayout and zero the struct.
Diagnostic: count and report cells whose patch stencils are fully local.
Synchronise remote coordinates and evaluate the geometry kernel for all local cells.
Construct a serial DMPlex from the IBMNodes connectivity on rank 0.
Build current covariant/contravariant basis vectors for one element.
Update reference midsurface geometry cache for one element.
Update current midsurface geometry cache for one element.
Broadcast updated vertex coordinates from owning ranks to all ranks that need them.
